parts.label: Primary Structure (3U)

risk.desc: Design complexity may affect manufacturability.
risk.mit: Simplify design where possible and validate with prototyping.

risk.desc: Mass budget may be exceeded if material density assumptions are incorrect.
risk.mit: Conduct detailed material density analysis and adjust design as needed.

risk.desc: Deployer mechanism may not function as expected without thorough testing.
risk.mit: Perform extensive testing of the deployer mechanism before final assembly.

risk.desc: Thermal management may be insufficient if heat sinks are not properly integrated.
risk.mit: Enhance thermal management by integrating additional heat sinks and testing.

risk.desc: Electrical interfaces may be compromised if PCB connectors are not properly dimensioned.
risk.mit: Validate PCB connector dimensions and ensure they match catalog specifications.

flow_path: Thermal dissipation from avionics to outer shell via heat sinks
integration_opportunities: Enhance thermal management with additional heat sinks
Integrate PCB connectors for power and data
verification_focus: Mass verification: Ensure total mass is within 3U CubeSat budget
Interface clearance verification: Confirm all bolted interfaces have proper clearance
Deployer mechanism function test: Verify rails deploy and retract as expected

risk.desc: Risk of burn-wire mechanism failure during deployment.

generated_parts.label: Payload Optics Bench
generated_parts.spec: EO payload optics bench, thermal stability, optical baffles, focal plane interface, lens mounts

requirements: EO payload optics bench, thermal stability, optical baffles, focal plane interface, lens mounts
Removable payload module: optics bench, focal plane, thermal baffles, inspection window
Battery, sensor, actuator, cartridge, payload, cable, or joint modules remain removable without full teardown
Harnesses, tubes, or service channels are routed through visible raceways or protected channels
Access is represented by geometry: hatch, pocket, channel, fastener pattern, slot, window, or removable cover
Every cable exit shows strain relief geometry (clamp, grommet, tie point) and routing respects a stated minimum bend radius away from moving joints and sharp edges
Connectors are reachable without disassembling structure, have finger/tool clearance, and mention keying or labeling to prevent mis-mating
Rails, PC/104 standoffs, payload bay, and board stack clearances are visible
Avionics, battery, antenna, and payload modules have removable trays or access panels
Design is an educational structural/electrical mockup and avoids flight qualification claims
Structure, power, avionics, comms, and payload are decomposed with simple mass/volume/power budget notes per module that sum consistently
